value: The project uses src/ui.js for CLI rendering (chalk only, no boxen/cli-table3/ora anymore) and src/lang.js for i18n. All user-facing text goes through the t() function from lang.js. Set POOHCODE_LANG env var or use /language command to switch languages. Supported: zh, en, fr, it, de, ru, ja, ko. Tool calls are shown dynamically via ToolStatusDisplay class (showBatch/hideBatch), clearing from terminal after completion. Commands are /exit, /clear, /language.
CLI换行规则统一了：每个turn开始前console.log()一个空行，思考框和回答直接输出不额外加\n，turn summary紧跟在回答后面，catch错误也去掉了额外的\n。调用链保持：用户输入→console.log()→思考框→streamed回答→turn summary，中间不插空行。

CLI rendering uses 'format' functions that return strings (no side effects). The caller (index.js) is responsible for actual output via console.log(). Two exceptions: highlightStream() and showConfirmSelector() — the former is output directly process.stdout.write for streaming, the latter uses readline/raw-mode for interactive input. All other output is formatted strings.
